name: writhing_stalker.live_hit_fade_retreat_mcw
description: Live hit-fade-retreat row: vulnerable midnight scene records a bounded strike burst followed by withdraw/cooling-off retreat with about 8+ tile retreat intent visible in current-build live-plan logs.

steps.label: post_load_hit_fade_retreat_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: vulnerable-midnight saved-active-stalker fixture loads to live map for the hit-fade retreat window

steps.label: audit_saved_midnight_before_hit_fade_retreat
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove expected midnight time before live writhing-stalker hit-fade window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved turn proves local midnight before hit-fade retreat window

steps.label: audit_saved_writhing_stalker_before_hit_fade_retreat
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain required live hit-fade scenario footing
steps.expected_visible_fact: one hostile stalker starts eight tiles south on a clean lane with cover-route opportunity before current-build live turns advance

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_hit_fade_retreat
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off so the bounded live turn window is not consumed by warnings

steps.label: advance_hit_fade_retreat_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: long bounded live turn window records at least two strikes followed by current-build retreat/cooling-off intent rather than one-hit flee or endless melee spam

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_hit_fade_retreat_live_plan
steps.abort_reason: same-run artifact lacked the current-build strike/burst/cooling-off retreat-distance live-plan sequence
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves two-strike burst accounting and about-eight-tile withdraw/retreat intent after the burst limit

evidence_contract.claim: current-build writhing stalker uses its live monster::plan seam for bounded hit-fade rhythm: at least two close strikes in a vulnerable dark scene, burst counter reaches its limit, then cooldown/retreat intent targets about eight tiles instead of A/B hovering or endless melee spam
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for writhing-stalker hit-fade retreat behavior
evidence_contract.writeback_note: No save/writeback gate: this row proves bounded current-run live-plan behavior from logs plus saved start-state footing; persistent map mutation is not part of the product claim.
